# SofaShine

> Professional sofa and home cleaning services in Delhi NCR, India. Eco-friendly, transparent pricing, same-day service available.

## About

SofaShine is a professional cleaning service company founded in 2025, based in Delhi, India. We serve residential and commercial customers across Delhi NCR with sofa cleaning, carpet cleaning, mattress cleaning, and pest control services. We have served over 1,000 customers and maintain a 4.9/5 rating.

Contact: +91 9315576914 | hello@sofashine.in | https://sofashine.in

## Services

- **Fabric Sofa Cleaning** — Deep steam cleaning for fabric upholstery. Removes stains, odors, and allergens. Starting from ₹499.
- **Leather Sofa Cleaning** — Specialized treatment for leather sofas including conditioning and protection. Starting from ₹699.
- **Carpet & Rug Cleaning** — Hot water extraction cleaning for carpets and rugs of all sizes. Starting from ₹299.
- **Mattress Cleaning** — UV sanitization and deep cleaning to remove dust mites and allergens. Starting from ₹499.
- **Pest Control** — Safe and effective pest control for homes and offices. Starting from ₹999.
- **Full Home Cleaning** — Comprehensive home deep cleaning packages available.

All services include eco-friendly, non-toxic cleaning products. Service duration: 2–4 hours. Quick drying process: 2–4 hours post-service.

## Service Area

Delhi NCR including: Delhi, Noida, Gurgaon, Faridabad, Ghaziabad, Greater Noida.

## Pricing

Transparent, upfront pricing with no hidden charges. Discounts available for first-time customers (10% off). Package deals available for multiple services.

## Guarantees

- 100% satisfaction guarantee
- Free re-cleaning if not satisfied
- Trained and verified professionals
- Eco-friendly, pet-safe cleaning products
